015 */
016package edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.service;
017
018import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.exception.UserNotFoundException;
019import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.dto.UserProfileResponse;
020import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.entity.UserProfile;
021import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.service.repository.IssueReportRepository;
022import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.service.repository.UserProfileRepository;
023import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.service.storage.StorageService;
024import java.net.URL;
025import java.util.List;
026import java.util.NoSuchElementException;
027import java.util.Optional;
028import java.util.UUID;
029import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
030import org.springframework.data.domain.Page;
031import org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable;
032import org.springframework.security.core.context.SecurityContextHolder;
033import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
034import org.springframework.web.servlet.support.ServletUriComponentsBuilder;
035
036/**
037 * Implementation of {@link UserService} providing business logic for user profile operations.
038 * This service handles OAuth2-based user identification and creation, as well as profile updates.
039 */
040@Service
041public class UserServiceImpl implements UserService {
042
043  private static final String OAUTH_SUB_CLAIM = "sub";
044  private static final String OAUTH_NAME_CLAIM = "name";
045
046  private final UserProfileRepository repository;
047  private final IssueReportRepository issueReportRepository;
048  private final StorageService storageService;
049
050  /**
051   * Constructs an instance of {@code UserServiceImpl} with the specified repositories.
052   *
053   * @param repository user profile repository for persistence operations.
054   * @param issueReportRepository issue report repository for report count lookups.
055   */
056  @Autowired
057  public UserServiceImpl(UserProfileRepository repository,
058      IssueReportRepository issueReportRepository, StorageService storageService) {
059    this.repository = repository;
060    this.issueReportRepository = issueReportRepository;
061    this.storageService = storageService;
062  }
063
064  @Override
065  public UserProfile getCurrentUser() {
066    //noinspection DataFlowIssue
067    return (UserProfile) SecurityContextHolder
068        .getContext()
069        .getAuthentication()
070        .getPrincipal();
071  }
072
073  @Override
074  public Optional<UserProfile> get(Long id) {
075    return repository.findById(id);
076  }
077
078  @Override
079  public UserProfile getOrCreate(String oauthKey, UserProfile userProfile) {
080    return repository
081        .findByOauthKey(oauthKey)
082        .orElseGet(() -> {
083          userProfile.setOauthKey(oauthKey);
084          return repository.save(userProfile);
085        });
086  }
087
088  @Override
089  public UserProfile updateDisplayName(Long id, String displayName) {
090    return repository
091        .findById(id)
092        .map(user -> {
093          user.setDisplayName(displayName);
094          return repository.save(user);
095        })
096        .orElseThrow(NoSuchElementException::new);
097  }
098
099  @Override
100  public UserProfile updateEmail(Long id, String email) {
101    return repository
102        .findById(id)
103        .map(user -> {
104          user.setEmail(email);
105          return repository.save(user);
106        })
107        .orElseThrow(NoSuchElementException::new);
108  }
109
110  @Override
111  public UserProfile updateAvatar(Long id, URL avatar) {
112    return repository
113        .findById(id)
114        .map(user -> {
115          user.setAvatar(avatar);
116          return repository.save(user);
117        })
118        .orElseThrow(NoSuchElementException::new);
119  }
120
121  @Override
122  public UserProfile updateAvatarKey(Long id, String storageKey, String contentType) {
123    return repository
124        .findById(id)
125        .map(user -> {
126          // Best-effort cleanup of prior custom avatar (if present).
127          String priorKey = user.getAvatarKey();
128          if (priorKey != null && !priorKey.isBlank() && !priorKey.equals(storageKey)) {
129            try {
130              storageService.delete(priorKey);
131            } catch (Exception e) {
132              // TODO: Consider asynchronous cleanup / orphan reaper. Avoid breaking avatar updates.
133            }
134          }
135
136          user.setAvatarKey(storageKey);
137          user.setAvatarMimeType(contentType);
138
139          try {
140            URL avatarUrl = ServletUriComponentsBuilder
141                .fromCurrentContextPath()
142                .path("/users/{externalId}/avatar")
143                .buildAndExpand(user.getExternalId())
144                .toUri()
145                .toURL();
146            user.setAvatar(avatarUrl);
147          } catch (Exception e) {
148            throw new RuntimeException("Failed to create backend avatar URL", e);
149          }
150
151          return repository.save(user);
152        })
153        .orElseThrow(NoSuchElementException::new);
154  }
155
156  @Override
157  public List<UserProfile> getAll() {
158    return repository.findAll();
159  }
160
161  @Override
162  public Page<UserProfile> getAll(Pageable pageable) {
163    return repository.findAll(pageable);
164  }
165
166  @Override
167  public UserProfile getMe() {
168    return getCurrentUser();
169  }
170
171  @Override
172  public Optional<UserProfile> getByExternalId(UUID externalId) {
173    return repository.findByExternalId(externalId);
174  }
175
176  @Override
177  public UserProfile setManagerStatus(UUID externalId, boolean manager) {
178    UserProfile user = repository
179        .findByExternalId(externalId)
180        .orElseThrow(() -> new UserNotFoundException("User not found: " + externalId));
181    user.setIsManager(manager);
182    return repository.save(user);
183  }
184
185  @Override
186  public UserProfile setEnabled(UUID externalId, boolean enabled) {
187    UserProfile user = repository
188        .findByExternalId(externalId)
189        .orElseThrow(() -> new UserNotFoundException("User not found: " + externalId));
190    user.setUserEnabled(enabled);
191    return repository.save(user);
192  }
193
194  /**
195   * Maps a {@link UserProfile} entity to a {@link UserProfileResponse}, including total report count.
196   *
197   * @param userProfile source entity.
198   * @return DTO enriched with report count.
199   */
200  @Override
201  public UserProfileResponse getUserProfileResponse(UserProfile userProfile) {
202    long reportCount = issueReportRepository.countByUserProfile(userProfile);
203    return new UserProfileResponse(
204        userProfile.getExternalId(),
205        userProfile.getDisplayName(),
206        userProfile.getEmail(),
207        userProfile.getAvatar(),
208        userProfile.isManager(),
209        userProfile.getTimeCreated(),
210        userProfile.getUserEnabled(),
211        reportCount
212    );
213  }
214
215}
